title: malveopsis stricta
intro: Malveopsis stricta, also known as White Horse Mint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Malveopsis stricta include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Malveopsis stricta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
